sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM TBL_PWDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND USERID = #id#
SELECT lang FROM TBL_USERLOCALINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND userID = #userID#
SELECT timeZone FROM TBL_USERLOCALINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND userID = #userID#
SELECT tenant_id FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE property_name = 'DomainName' AND property_value = #DOMAIN_NAME#
SELECT tenant_id tenantId, server_name serverName FROM TBL_TENANT_SERVERNAME
SELECT tenant_id tenantId, tenant_name tenantName FROM TBL_TENANT
SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND UPPER(property_name) = #property#
SELECT property_name, property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT PROPERTY_VALUE FROM TBL_USER_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND PROPERTY_NAME = #property_name#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USER_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE = #property_value# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND PROPERTY_NAME = #property_name#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_USERLOCALINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND userID = #userID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT property_value FROM TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG WHERE rownum = 1
SELECT REFORMFLAG FROM TBL_FORMINFO WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG" ( "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0), "COMPANY_ID" NVARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL ENABLE, "PROPERTY_NAME" NVARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL ENABLE, "PROPERTY_VALUE" NVARCHAR2(2000) NOT NULL ENABLE, CONSTRAINT "PK2_TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG" PRIMARY KEY ("TENANT_ID", "COMPANY_ID", "PROPERTY_NAME") )
ALTER TABLE TBL_FORMINFO ADD REFORMFLAG CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N'
sqlMap.select: SELECT property_value FROM TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID# AND UPPER(property_name) = #property#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE = #propertyValue# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID# AND PROPERTY_NAME = #propertyName#
DELETE FROM TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID# AND PROPERTY_NAME = #propertyName#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_USER_MULTILOGIN (TENANT_ID, USER_ID, LOGIN_TIME) VALUES (#tenantID#, #userID#, #loginTime#)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_USER_MULTILOGIN WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USER_ID = #userID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT LOGIN_TIME FROM TBL_USER_MULTILOGIN WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USER_ID = #userID#
SELECT LOGIN_TIME FROM TBL_USER_MULTILOGIN WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE TBL_USER_MULTILOGIN ( TENANT_ID NUMBER, USER_ID NVARCHAR2(40), LOGIN_TIME VARCHAR2(15) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT "TBL_USER_MULTILOGIN_PK" PRIMARY KEY (USER_ID, TENANT_ID) )
sqlMap.select: SELECT MAIL FROM JMOCHA_DISTRIBUTION WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE JMOCHA_DISTRIBUTION ADD MAIL VARCHAR2(100 CHAR) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT ORDERBY FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ADD ORDERBY NVARCHAR2(200) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT ORDERBY FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ADD PROXY NVARCHAR2(200) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT ipno FROM TBL_ACCESS_IP WHERE rownum = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_ACCESS_IP" ( "IPNO" NUMBER(*,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL ENABLE, "IPADDRESS" VARCHAR2(100 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, "ACCESS" VARCHAR2(10 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, "EXPLANATION" VARCHAR2(200 BYTE), CONSTRAINT "TBL_ACCESS_IP_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("IPNO") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT accessno FROM TBL_ACCESS_ID WHERE rownum = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_ACCESS_ID" ( "ACCESSNO" NUMBER(5,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL ENABLE, "CN" VARCHAR2(80 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, CONSTRAINT "TBL_ACCESS_ID_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("ACCESSNO") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT domain_name FROM JMOCHA_DISTRIBUTION_SUB WHERE rownum = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "JMOCHA_DISTRIBUTION_SUB" ( "DOMAIN_NAME" NVARCHAR2(100), "USER_NAME" NVARCHAR2(100), "COMPANY_ID" NVARCHAR2(100), "SUB_MAIL" NVARCHAR2(100), "SUB_NAME" NVARCHAR2(100), CONSTRAINT "JMOCHA_DISTRIBUTION_SUB_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("DOMAIN_NAME", "USER_NAME", "SUB_MAIL"), CONSTRAINT "FK_DISTRIBUTION_SUB" FOREIGN KEY ("DOMAIN_NAME", "USER_NAME") REFERENCES "JMOCHA_DISTRIBUTION" ("DOMAIN_NAME", "USER_NAME") ON DELETE CASCADE ENABLE )
sqlMap.select: SELECT MANUAL_FLAG FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_USERMASTER ADD MANUAL_FLAG NVARCHAR2(2) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT MANUAL_FLAG FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_DEPTMASTER ADD MANUAL_FLAG NVARCHAR2(2) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT MANUAL_FLAG FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ADD MANUAL_FLAG NVARCHAR2(2) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT sign_no FROM JMOCHA_MAIL_SIGNATURE_TEMPLATE WHERE rownum = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE JMOCHA_MAIL_SIGNATURE_TEMPLATE ( SIGN_NO NUMBER NOT NULL , CONTENT LONG , DISPLAYNAME VARCHAR2(45) , DISPLAYNAME2 VARCHAR2(45) , TENANT_ID NUMBER DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL , COMPANY_ID VARCHAR2(45) , CONSTRAINT SIGNATURE_TEMPLATE_PK PRIMARY KEY ( SIGN_NO ) ENABLE )
sqlMap.select: SELECT JOBID FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_USER_JOBMASTER" ( "JOBID" NUMBER(10,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, "TYPE" NVARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL ENABLE, "CN" NVARCHAR2(100), "DISPLAYNAME" NVARCHAR2(200), "DISPLAYNAME2" NVARCHAR2(200), "USEFLAG" NVARCHAR2(2), "SORT" NUMBER(10,0), "CREATEDATE" DATE, "COMPANYID" VARCHAR2(40 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL ENABLE, CONSTRAINT "TBL_USER_JOBMASTER_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("JOBID", "TYPE", "COMPANYID", "TENANT_ID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT PASSWORD_UPDATEDT FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_USERMASTER ADD PASSWORD_UPDATEDT DATE DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_tenant_config (tenant_id, property_name, property_value, description, config_name, regdate) VALUES (#tenantID#, #confName#, #property_value#, #description#, #config_name#, sysdate)
sqlMap.select: SELECT JOBID FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ADD JOBID VARCHAR2(100) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT userId FROM TBL_webfolder_token where ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE tbl_webfolder_token ( "USERID" varchar2(32) NOT NULL, "LTOKEN" varchar2(128) DEFAULT NULL, "REGDATA" date DEFAULT NULL, "COMPID" varchar2(32) DEFAULT NULL, "TENANTID" varchar2(45) NOT NULL, "DEVICE" varchar2(128) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("USERID","TENANTID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT PREVIEW_MAIL_IMAGE FROM JMOCHA_MAIL_GENERAL WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
SELECT MAILBOXQUOTA, MAILBOXUSAGE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE JMOCHA_MAIL_GENERAL ADD PREVIEW_MAIL_IMAGE VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'Y'
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(IS_FIXED) FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_PORTLET
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_THEME_PORTLET ADD IS_FIXED NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT 0
ALTER TABLE TBL_USERMASTER ADD ( MAILBOXQUOTA VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL, MAILBOXUSAGE VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL )
sqlMap.select: SELECT theme_id FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_PORTLET where ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE TBL_PORTAL_THEME_PORTLET ( "THEME_ID" NUMBER(11,0), "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0), "COMPANY_ID" VARCHAR2(100), "PORTLET_ID" NUMBER(10,0), "PORTLET_USED" NUMBER(5,0), "PORTLET_ORDER" NUMBER(11,0), "MENU_ID" NUMBER(10,0), "IS_FIXED" NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY ("THEME_ID","TENANT_ID", "COMPANY_ID", "PORTLET_ID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT HOLIDAYFLAG FROM TBL_HOLIDAYLIST where ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_HOLIDAYLIST ADD HOLIDAYFLAG VARCHAR2(45) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT HOLIDAYREPEAT FROM TBL_HOLIDAYLIST where ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_HOLIDAYLIST ADD HOLIDAYREPEAT VARCHAR2(45) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT form_del_flag FROM TBL_JOURNAL_FORM WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_JOURNAL_FORM ADD ( form_del_flag VARCHAR2(10) DEFAULT NULL )
sqlMap.select: SELECT menu_id FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU WHERE menu_url LIKE '%taskIndex%' AND menu_id = 17 AND ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_MENU SET menu_url = '/ezTask/taskIndex.do' WHERE menu_id = 17
sqlMap.select: SELECT portlet_used FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER ADD PORTLET_USED NUMBER(11, 0) DEFAULT 1
sqlMap.select: SELECT theme_id FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER ADD THEME_ID NUMBER(11, 0) DEFAULT 1
ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER DROP PRIMARY KEY
ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER ADD CONSTRAINT TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER_PK PRIMARY KEY(user_id, tenant_id, company_id, portlet_id, theme_id)
sqlMap.select: SELECT is_default FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_USER WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_THEME_USER ADD is_default NUMBER(11, 0) DEFAULT 0
sqlMap.select: SELECT TENANT_ID FROM JMOCHA_MAIL_COPYRIGHT where ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE jmocha_mail_copyright ( "TENANT_ID" INT NOT NULL, "COPYRIGHT_TEXT" varchar2(1000) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("TENANT_ID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT MAILBOX_ID FROM JAMES_MAIL_DELETED_ID where ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "JAMES_MAIL_DELETED_ID" ( "MAILBOX_ID" NUMBER NOT NULL, "MAIL_UID" NUMBER NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT "JAMES_MAIL_DELETED_ID_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("MAILBOX_ID", "MAIL_UID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LISTOPTION WHERE LISTTYPE = 'S001' AND COLNAME = 'StartDate' AND NAME = '기안일시'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LISTOPTION WHERE LISTTYPE = 'S001' AND COLNAME = 'FunctionTypeName'
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_LISTOPTION SET NAME = '수신일자', NAME2 = 'ProcessDate', NAME3 = '到着日時', NAME4 = '接收日' WHERE LISTTYPE = 'S001' AND COLNAME = 'StartDate' AND NAME = '기안일시'
UPDATE TBL_LISTOPTION SET COLNAME = 'FunctionType' WHERE LISTTYPE = 'S001' AND COLNAME = 'FunctionTypeName'
sqlMap.select: SELECT ITEMID FROM TBL_BOARD_LIKE WHERE rownum = 1
SELECT LIKEFLAG FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE rownum = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "EZEKP2017"."TBL_BOARD_LIKE" ( "ITEMID" NVARCHAR2(40) NOT NULL ENABLE, "USERID" NVARCHAR2(20) NOT NULL ENABLE, "LIKEDATE" NVARCHAR2(20), "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, CONSTRAINT "TBL_BOARD_LIKE_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("ITEMID", "USERID", "TENANT_ID") )
ALTER TABLE TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO ADD LIKEFLAG NCHAR(1) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT LINKORDER FROM TBL_PS_QUICKLINK WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
select count(*) from ( select column_name from ALL_TAB_COLUMNS where COLUMN_NAME LIKE 'MESSAGE_ID' AND TABLE_NAME = 'JAMES_MAIL_SEARCH')
sqlMap.update: ALTER TABLE JAMES_MAIL_SEARCH ADD MESSAGE_ID VARCHAR(200)
sqlMap.select: SELECT FORMVERSION FROM TBL_FORMINFO WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_PS_QUICKLINK ADD LINKORDER NUMBER(11,0) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT COMPANYID FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
SELECT FORMVERSION FROM TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_C_COMCLOSE ADD COMPANYID NVARCHAR2(20) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT COMPANY_TOTAL_LIMIT, DEPARTMENT_TOTAL_LIMIT, USER_TOTAL_LIMIT FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG RENAME COLUMN TOTAL_LIMIT TO USER_TOTAL_LIMIT
ALTER TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG ADD (COMPANY_TOTAL_LIMIT VARCHAR2(100) DEFAULT NULL, DEPARTMENT_TOTAL_LIMIT VARCHAR2(100) DEFAULT NULL)
sqlMap.select: SELECT TYPE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_USER WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_USER ADD TYPE VARCHAR2(50)
ALTER TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_USER MODIFY TYPE VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL
ALTER TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_USER DROP PRIMARY KEY
ALTER TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_USER ADD PRIMARY KEY (CN, TENANT_ID, TYPE) ENABLE
sqlMap.select: SELECT B_MEMO_WIDTH FROM TBL_MEMO_CONFIG WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_MEMO_CONFIG ADD ( B_MEMO_LEFT NUMBER(6, 0) DEFAULT 0, B_MEMO_TOP NUMBER(6, 0) DEFAULT 0, B_MEMO_WIDTH NUMBER(6, 0) DEFAULT 0, B_MEMO_HEIGHT NUMBER(6, 0) DEFAULT 0, B_MEMO_STATUS NUMBER(4, 0) DEFAULT 0, MEMO_ID NUMBER(10, 0) DEFAULT 0 )
sqlMap.select: SELECT FORMVERSION FROM TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
SELECT FORMVERSION FROM TBL_TMPEXPAPRDOCINFO WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_FORMINFO ADD FORMVERSION NUMBER(10,0) DEFAULT 0
ALTER TABLE TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO ADD FORMVERSION NUMBER(10,0) DEFAULT 0
ALTER TABLE TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ADD COLUMN FORMVERSION NUMBER(10,0) DEFAULT 0
ALTER TABLE TBL_TMPEXPAPRDOCINFO ADD COLUMN FORMVERSION NUMBER(10,0) DEFAULT 0
sqlMap.select: SELECT USER_ID FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL" ("USER_ID" NVARCHAR2(80), "YEAR" NVARCHAR2(8), "TOTAL_ANNUAL_CNT" NUMBER(3,1), "COMPANY_ID" NVARCHAR2(200), "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0), CONSTRAINT "TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("TENANT_ID", "USER_ID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT ATTITUDE_ID FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CANAPPL WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CANAPPL" ( "ATTITUDE_ID" NUMBER(20,0) NOT NULL, "APPL_CNT" NUMBER(11,0) NOT NULL, "COMPANY_ID" NVARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL, "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0) NOT NULL, "WRITER_ID" NVARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL, "WRITER_NAME" NVARCHAR2(100) DEFAULT NULL, "WRITER_NAME2" NVARCHAR2(100) DEFAULT NULL, "WRITER_TITLE" NVARCHAR2(200) DEFAULT NULL, "WRITER_TITLE2" NVARCHAR2(200) DEFAULT NULL, "WRITER_DEPT_ID" NVARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL, "WRITER_DEPT_NAME" NVARCHAR2(100) DEFAULT NULL, "WRITER_DEPT_NAME2" NVARCHAR2(100) DEFAULT NULL, "DELFLAG" CHAR(1) DEFAULT '0', "APPR_USER_ID" NVARCHAR2(80) DEFAULT NULL, "APPR_DATE" DATE DEFAULT NULL, "APPR_STATUS" CHAR(1) DEFAULT '0', "CONTENT" NVARCHAR2(2000) DEFAULT NULL , "APPR_USER_NAME" NVARCHAR2(100) DEFAULT NULL, "APPR_USER_NAME2" NVARCHAR2(100) DEFAULT NULL , "APPL_DATE" DATE DEFAULT NULL, CONSTRAINT "TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CANAPPL_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("ATTITUDE_ID","APPL_CNT","COMPANY_ID","TENANT_ID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT COMPANY_ID FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CONF WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CONF" ( "COMPANY_ID" NVARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL, "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0) NOT NULL, "ANNUAL_CANCEL_RULE" CHAR(1) DEFAULT '1' NOT NULL , "USE_ANNUAL_AUTO_GNRT" CHAR(1) DEFAULT '1' NOT NULL, "ANNUAL_GNRT_STD" CHAR(1) DEFAULT '1' NOT NULL, "INITIAL_DATE" DATE DEFAULT NULL, "USE_MINUS_ANNUAL" CHAR(1)DEFAULT '1' NOT NULL, "USE_ANNUAL_TMNT" CHAR(1) DEFAULT '1' NOT NULL, "ROUND_OFF_RULE" CHAR(1) DEFAULT '1' NOT NULL, "CONF_SET_DATE" DATE NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT "TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CONF_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("COMPANY_ID","TENANT_ID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT ANNUAL_HISTORY_ID FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_HISTORY WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_HISTORY" ("ANNUAL_HISTORY_ID" NUMBER(20,0), "USER_ID" NVARCHAR2(80), "ORIGIN_ANNUAL_CNT" NUMBER(3,1), "CHANGE_ANNUAL_CNT" NUMBER(3,1), "CHANGE_REASON" NVARCHAR2(2000), "CHANGE_DATE" DATE, "CHANGE_USER_ID" NVARCHAR2(80), "COMPANY_ID" NVARCHAR2(200), "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0), CONSTRAINT "TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_HISTORY_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("ANNUAL_HISTORY_ID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT ATTITUDE_ID FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_APR_CONN WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_ATTITUDE_APR_CONN" ( "ATTITUDE_ID" NUMBER(20,0) NOT NULL, "USER_ID" NVARCHAR2(80) DEFAULT NULL, "ANNUAL_DOC_ID" NVARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL, "CANCEL_DOC_ID" NVARCHAR2(80) DEFAULT NULL, "ANNUAL_APPR_STATUS" CHAR(1) DEFAULT NULL, "CANCEL_APPR_STATUS" CHAR(1) DEFAULT NULL, "COMPANY_ID" NVARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL, "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT "TBL_ATTITUDE_APR_CONN_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("ATTITUDE_ID","COMPANY_ID","TENANT_ID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT BRD_ID FROM TBL_RS_PERSPORTLET WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_RS_PERSPORTLET" ( "CN" NVARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL, "BRD_ID" NUMBER(10,0) NOT NULL, "BRD_COMPANY" NVARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL, "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT "TBL_RS_PERSPORTLET_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("TENANT_ID","CN","BRD_COMPANY","BRD_ID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT THEME_CONTENT2 FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_THEME ADD ( THEME_CONTENT2 VARCHAR(400) DEFAULT 'theme content', THEME_NAME2 VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'theme2' )
sqlMap.select: SELECT THEME_CONTENT3 FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_THEME ADD ( THEME_CONTENT3 VARCHAR(400) DEFAULT 'theme content', THEME_NAME3 VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'theme3' )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME SET THEME_CONTENT2 = CASE WHEN theme_id = 1 THEN 'A theme with a fixed area on the left or right.' WHEN theme_id = 2 THEN 'A theme with a fixed area on the top.' WHEN theme_id = 3 THEN 'A theme that consists of only portlets without fixed areas.' END, THEME_NAME2 = CASE WHEN theme_id = 1 THEN 'Theme1' WHEN theme_id = 2 THEN 'Theme2' WHEN theme_id = 3 THEN 'Theme3' END

UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME SET THEME_CONTENT3 = CASE WHEN theme_id = 1 THEN '固定領域を画面の右または左に配置できるテーマです。' WHEN theme_id = 2 THEN '固定領域が画面の上部に表示されるテーマです。' WHEN theme_id = 3 THEN '固定領域がなく、すべてのポートレットを自由に配置できるテーマです。' END , THEME_NAME3 = CASE WHEN theme_id = 1 THEN 'Theme1' WHEN theme_id = 2 THEN 'Theme2' WHEN theme_id = 3 THEN 'Theme3' END
sqlMap.select: select property_value from tbl_tenant_config where property_name = 'useSurvey' and tenant_id = 0
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, CONFIG_NAME, REGDATE) VALUES (#tenantId#, #propertyName#, #propertyValue#, #description#, #configName#, TO_DATE(#regDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'))
sqlMap.select: SELECT DISTINCT(PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME) as companyId , TENANT_ID as tenantId FROM TBL_USERMASTER ORDER BY PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME
SELECT PORTLET_URL FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET WHERE PORTLET_ID = #portletId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET (PORTLET_ID, MENU_ID, PORTLET_URL, PORTLET_TYPE, DEFAULT_ORDER) VALUES (#portletId#, #menuId#, #portletUrl#, #portletType#, #defaultOrder#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT COMPANY_ID FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND PORTLET_ID = #portletId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP (COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, PORTLET_ID, MENU_ID, PORTLET_USED, PORTLET_ORDER, BOARD_ID) VALUES (#companyId#, #tenantId#, #portletId#, #menuId#, #portletUsed#, #portletOrder#, #boardId#)

INSERT ALL INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME (PORTLET_ID, MENU_ID, PORTLET_LANG, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PORTLET_NAME) VALUES (#portletId#, #menuId#, 1, #tenantId#, #companyId#, '자원관리') INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME (PORTLET_ID, MENU_ID, PORTLET_LANG, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PORTLET_NAME) VALUES (#portletId#, #menuId#, 2, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 'Resource') INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME (PORTLET_ID, MENU_ID, PORTLET_LANG, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PORTLET_NAME) VALUES (#portletId#, #menuId#, 3, #tenantId#, #companyId#, '設備管理') SELECT * FROM DUAL

INSERT ALL INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME (PORTLET_ID, MENU_ID, PORTLET_LANG, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PORTLET_NAME) VALUES (#portletId#, #menuId#, 1, #tenantId#, #companyId#, '개인폴더') INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME (PORTLET_ID, MENU_ID, PORTLET_LANG, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PORTLET_NAME) VALUES (#portletId#, #menuId#, 2, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 'Personal Folder') INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME (PORTLET_ID, MENU_ID, PORTLET_LANG, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PORTLET_NAME) VALUES (#portletId#, #menuId#, 3, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 'Webフォルダ') SELECT * FROM DUAL

INSERT ALL INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME (PORTLET_ID, MENU_ID, PORTLET_LANG, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PORTLET_NAME) VALUES (#portletId#, #menuId#, 1, #tenantId#, #companyId#, '전자설문') INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME (PORTLET_ID, MENU_ID, PORTLET_LANG, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PORTLET_NAME) VALUES (#portletId#, #menuId#, 2, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 'Survey') INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME (PORTLET_ID, MENU_ID, PORTLET_LANG, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PORTLET_NAME) VALUES (#portletId#, #menuId#, 3, #tenantId#, #companyId#, '電子アンケート') SELECT * FROM DUAL

INSERT ALL INTO TBL_PORTAL_THEME_PORTLET (THEME_ID, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PORTLET_ID, PORTLET_USED, PORTLET_ORDER, MENU_ID, IS_FIXED) VALUES (1, #tenantId#, #companyId#, #portletId#, #portletUsed#, #portletOrder#, #menuId#, 0) INTO TBL_PORTAL_THEME_PORTLET (THEME_ID, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PORTLET_ID, PORTLET_USED, PORTLET_ORDER, MENU_ID, IS_FIXED) VALUES (2, #tenantId#, #companyId#, #portletId#, #portletUsed#, #portletOrder#, #menuId#, 0) INTO TBL_PORTAL_THEME_PORTLET (THEME_ID, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PORTLET_ID, PORTLET_USED, PORTLET_ORDER, MENU_ID, IS_FIXED) VALUES (3, #tenantId#, #companyId#, #portletId#, #portletUsed#, #portletOrder#, #menuId#, 0) SELECT * FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH (PORTLET_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, USER_ID, ACCESS_YN, USER_TYPE) VALUES (#portletId#, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 1, 0)
sqlMap.select: SELECT theme_id FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_AUTH where ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_PORTAL_THEME_AUTH" ( "THEME_ID" NUMBER(10,0) DEFAULT 0, "COMPANY_ID" VARCHAR2(100) DEFAULT NULL, "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT 0, "USER_ID" VARCHAR2(100) DEFAULT NULL, "ACCESS_YN" NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT 0, "USER_TYPE" NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT 0, CONSTRAINT "TBL_PORTAL_THEME_AUTH_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("THEME_ID","COMPANY_ID", "TENANT_ID", "USER_ID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT portlet_id FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH where ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "EZEKP2017"."TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH" ( "PORTLET_ID" NUMBER(10,0), "COMPANY_ID" VARCHAR2(100), "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0), "USER_ID" VARCHAR2(100), "ACCESS_YN" NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT 0, "USER_TYPE" NUMBER(5,0), CONSTRAINT "TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("PORTLET_ID","COMPANY_ID", "TENANT_ID", "USER_ID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT menucode FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_MENU ADD menucode VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT portletcode FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET ADD portletcode VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_MENU SET menucode = CASE WHEN menu_url like '%ezNewPortal%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'portal' WHEN menu_url like '%mailMain.do' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'mail' WHEN menu_url like '%ezSchedule%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'schedule' WHEN menu_url like '%ezApprovalG%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'approval' WHEN menu_url like '%ezBoard%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'board' WHEN menu_url like '%ezCommunity%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'community' WHEN menu_url like '%ezResource%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'resource' WHEN menu_url like '%ezCircular%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'circular' WHEN menu_url like '%ezJournal%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'journal' WHEN menu_url like '%ezAttitude%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'attitude' WHEN menu_url like '%ezWebFolder%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'webfolder' WHEN menu_url like '%ezCabinet%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'cabinet' WHEN menu_url like '%ezPMS%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'pms' WHEN menu_url like '%mailMain.do?funCode=2%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'address' WHEN menu_url like '%ezQuestion%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'question' WHEN menu_url like '%ezPoll%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'vote' WHEN menu_url like '%ezLadder%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'ladder' WHEN menu_url like '%ezTask%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'task' WHEN menu_url like '%ezMemo%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'memo' WHEN menu_url like '%ezSurvey%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'survey' END

UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET SET portletcode = CASE WHEN portlet_url like '%receivedMailPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'receivedmail' WHEN portlet_url like '%noticePortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'notice' WHEN portlet_url like '%votePortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'vote' WHEN portlet_url like '%pollPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'poll' WHEN portlet_url like '%schedulePortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'schedule' WHEN portlet_url like '%approvalListPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'approvallist' WHEN portlet_url like '%favoriteFormsPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'favoriteforms' WHEN portlet_url like '%photoBoardPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'photoboard' WHEN portlet_url like '%favoriteBoardPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'favoriteboard' WHEN portlet_url like '%communityPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'community' WHEN portlet_url like '%helpPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'help' WHEN portlet_url like '%weatherPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'weather' WHEN portlet_url like '%birthdayPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'birthday' WHEN portlet_url like '%slideImagePortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'slideimage' WHEN portlet_url like '%userInfoPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'userinfo' WHEN portlet_url like '%movieBoardPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'movieboard' WHEN portlet_url like '%countPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'count' WHEN portlet_url like '%resourcePortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'resource' WHEN portlet_url like '%surveyPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'survey' WHEN portlet_url like '%webFolderPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'webfolder' END
sqlMap.select: SELECT START_IP startIP, END_IP endIP, START_IP_NUMBER startIPNumber, END_IP_NUMBER endIPNumber, COUNTRY_CODE countryCode, COUNTRY_NAME countryName FROM JMOCHA_MAIL_COUNTRYIP WHERE START_IP_NUMBER <= #changeIp# AND END_IP_NUMBER >= #changeIp#
SELECT TENANT_ID FROM TBL_ACCESS_COUNTRY WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_ACCESS_COUNTRY" ( "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(20,0) NOT NULL, "COUNTRY_CODE" NVARCHAR2(800) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT "TBL_ACCESS_COUNTRY" PRIMARY KEY ("TENANT_ID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT sn FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH ADD sn INT DEFAULT 0
sqlMap.select: SELECT sn FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_AUTH WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_THEME_AUTH ADD sn INT DEFAULT 0
sqlMap.select: SELECT sn FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH ADD sn INT DEFAULT 0
sqlMap.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE APRTYPE = '007' AND APRSTATE = '002') + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE APRTYPE = '007' AND APRSTATE = '002') AS CNT FROM DUAL
sqlMap.statement: ALTER VIEW vaprdoingdoclist AS SELECT tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCID AS DOCID, tbl_aprdocinfo.FORMID AS FORMID, tbl_aprdocinfo.ORGDOCID AS ORGDOCID, tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCTYPE AS DOCTYPE, CASE WHEN (tbl_aprlineinfo.APRSTATE = '002' AND tbl_aprlineinfo.APRTYPE = '007') THEN '017' ELSE tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCSTATE END AS DOCSTATE, CASE WHEN (tbl_aprlineinfo.APRSTATE = '000' AND tbl_aprdocinfo.FUNCTIONTYPE <> '004') THEN '002' ELSE tbl_aprdocinfo.FUNCTIONTYPE END AS FUNCTIONTYPE, tbl_aprdocinfo.HREF AS HREF, tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCTITLE AS DOCTITLE, tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCNO AS DOCNO, tbl_aprdocinfo.HASATTACHYN AS HASATTACHYN, tbl_aprdocinfo.HASOPINIONYN AS HASOPINIONYN, tbl_aprdocinfo.STARTDATE AS STARTDATE, tbl_aprdocinfo.ENDDATE AS ENDDATE, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERID AS WRITERID, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERNAME AS WRITERNAME, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERJOBTITLE AS WRITERJOBTITLE, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERDEPTID AS WRITERDEPTID, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERDEPTNAME AS WRITERDEPTNAME, tbl_aprdocinfo.ISPUBLIC AS ISPUBLIC, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERNAME2 AS WRITERNAME2, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERJOBTITLE2 AS WRITERJOBTITLE2, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERDEPTNAME2 AS WRITERDEPTNAME2, tbl_aprdocinfo.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, tbl_aprdocinfo.COMPANYID AS COMPANYID, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERSN AS APRMEMBERSN, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRTYPE AS APRTYPE, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRSTATE AS APRSTATE, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERID AS APRMEMBERID, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERNAME AS APRMEMBERNAME, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERNAME2 AS APRMEMBERNAME2, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE AS APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 AS APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERDEPTID AS APRMEMBERDEPTID, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME AS APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2 AS APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, tbl_aprlineinfo.RECEIVEDDATE AS RECEIVEDDATE, tbl_expaprdocinfo.FORMNAME AS FORMNAME, tbl_expaprdocinfo.FORMNAME2 AS FORMNAME2, tbl_expaprdocinfo.URGENTAPPROVAL AS URGENTAPPROVAL, tbl_deptmaster.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 AS companyName, tbl_deptmaster.COMPNM2 AS companyName2 FROM (((tbl_aprdocinfo JOIN tbl_aprlineinfo ON (tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCID = tbl_aprlineinfo.DOCID AND tbl_aprdocinfo.TENANT_ID = tbl_aprlineinfo.TENANT_ID AND tbl_aprdocinfo.COMPANYID = tbl_aprlineinfo.COMPANYID)) JOIN tbl_expaprdocinfo ON (tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCID = tbl_expaprdocinfo.DOCID AND tbl_aprdocinfo.TENANT_ID = tbl_expaprdocinfo.TENANT_ID AND tbl_aprdocinfo.COMPANYID = tbl_expaprdocinfo.COMPANYID)) JOIN tbl_deptmaster ON (tbl_aprdocinfo.COMPANYID = tbl_deptmaster.CN AND tbl_aprdocinfo.TENANT_ID = tbl_deptmaster.TENANT_ID)) WHERE (tbl_aprlineinfo.APRSTATE = '002' OR tbl_aprlineinfo.APRSTATE = '005') AND NOT (TBL_APRDOCINFO.functiontype = '004' AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.aprtype = '007') AND tbl_aprdocinfo.STARTDATE IS NOT NULL

ALTER VIEW vendchamjodocinfo AS SELECT tbl_endaprdocinfo.DOCID AS DOCID, tbl_endaprdocinfo.FORMID AS FORMID, tbl_endaprdocinfo.ORGDOCID AS ORGDOCID, tbl_endaprdocinfo.DOCTYPE AS DOCTYPE, '017' AS DOCSTATE, '002' AS FUNCTIONTYPE, tbl_endaprdocinfo.HREF AS HREF, tbl_endaprdocinfo.DOCTITLE AS DOCTITLE, tbl_endaprdocinfo.DOCNO AS DOCNO, tbl_endaprdocinfo.HASATTACHYN AS HASATTACHYN, tbl_endaprdocinfo.HASOPINIONYN AS HASOPINIONYN, tbl_endaprdocinfo.STARTDATE AS STARTDATE, tbl_endaprdocinfo.ENDDATE AS ENDDATE, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERID AS WRITERID, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERNAME AS WRITERNAME, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERJOBTITLE AS WRITERJOBTITLE, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERDEPTID AS WRITERDEPTID, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERDEPTNAME AS WRITERDEPTNAME, tbl_endaprdocinfo.ISPUBLIC AS ISPUBLIC, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERNAME2 AS WRITERNAME2, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERJOBTITLE2 AS WRITERJOBTITLE2, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERDEPTNAME2 AS WRITERDEPTNAME2, tbl_endaprdocinfo.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, tbl_endaprdocinfo.COMPANYID AS COMPANYID, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERSN AS APRMEMBERSN, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRTYPE AS APRTYPE, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRSTATE AS APRSTATE, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERID AS APRMEMBERID, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERNAME AS APRMEMBERNAME, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERNAME2 AS APRMEMBERNAME2, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE AS APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 AS APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERDEPTID AS APRMEMBERDEPTID, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME AS APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2 AS APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, tbl_endaprlineinfo.RECEIVEDDATE AS RECEIVEDDATE, tbl_expendaprdocinfo.FORMNAME AS FORMNAME, tbl_expendaprdocinfo.FORMNAME2 AS FORMNAME2, tbl_expendaprdocinfo.URGENTAPPROVAL AS URGENTAPPROVAL, tbl_deptmaster.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 AS companyName, tbl_deptmaster.COMPNM2 AS companyName2 FROM (((tbl_endaprdocinfo JOIN tbl_endaprlineinfo ON (tbl_endaprdocinfo.DOCID = tbl_endaprlineinfo.DOCID AND tbl_endaprdocinfo.TENANT_ID = tbl_endaprlineinfo.TENANT_ID AND tbl_endaprdocinfo.COMPANYID = tbl_endaprlineinfo.COMPANYID)) JOIN tbl_expendaprdocinfo ON (tbl_endaprdocinfo.DOCID = tbl_expendaprdocinfo.DOCID AND tbl_endaprdocinfo.TENANT_ID = tbl_expendaprdocinfo.TENANT_ID AND tbl_endaprdocinfo.COMPANYID = tbl_expendaprdocinfo.COMPANYID)) JOIN tbl_deptmaster ON (tbl_endaprdocinfo.COMPANYID = tbl_deptmaster.CN AND tbl_endaprdocinfo.TENANT_ID = tbl_deptmaster.TENANT_ID)) WHERE tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRTYPE = '007' AND tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRSTATE = '002' AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docstate <> '031'
sqlMap.select: SELECT S_FURIGANA FROM jmocha_address_info WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.update: ALTER TABLE JMOCHA_ADDRESS_INFO ADD S_FURIGANA NVARCHAR2(120) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(DEPTID) FROM (SELECT DEPTID FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER TD ON (A.DEPTID = TD.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = TD.TENANT_ID) WHERE TD.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 <> (SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) AND A.CN = #userID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# UNION SELECT DEPARTMENT AS DEPTID FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) D WHERE D.DEPTID = #deptID#
SELECT RESID FROM TBL_RS_FAVORITE WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE TBL_RS_FAVORITE ( "RESID" NVARCHAR2(40), "RESCOMPANY" NVARCHAR2(40), "USERID" NVARCHAR2(40), "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT 0, CONSTRAINT "PK_TBL_RS_FAVORITE" PRIMARY KEY ("RESID", "USERID", "TENANT_ID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT company_id FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_AUTH WHERE company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND ROWNUM = 1
SELECT company_id FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH WHERE company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.insert: INSERT ALL INTO TBL_PORTAL_THEME_AUTH (THEME_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, USER_ID, ACCESS_YN, USER_TYPE, SN) VALUES (1, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 1, 0, 1) INTO TBL_PORTAL_THEME_AUTH (THEME_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, USER_ID, ACCESS_YN, USER_TYPE, SN) VALUES (2, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 1, 0, 1) INTO TBL_PORTAL_THEME_AUTH (THEME_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, USER_ID, ACCESS_YN, USER_TYPE, SN) VALUES (3, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 1, 0, 1) SELECT * FROM DUAL

INSERT ALL INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH (PORTLET_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, USER_ID, ACCESS_YN, USER_TYPE, SN) VALUES (1, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 1, 0, 1) INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH (PORTLET_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, USER_ID, ACCESS_YN, USER_TYPE, SN) VALUES (2, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 1, 0, 1) INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH (PORTLET_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, USER_ID, ACCESS_YN, USER_TYPE, SN) VALUES (4, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 1, 0, 1) INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH (PORTLET_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, USER_ID, ACCESS_YN, USER_TYPE, SN) VALUES (5, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 1, 0, 1) INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH (PORTLET_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, USER_ID, ACCESS_YN, USER_TYPE, SN) VALUES (6, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 1, 0, 1) INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH (PORTLET_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, USER_ID, ACCESS_YN, USER_TYPE, SN) VALUES (7, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 1, 0, 1) INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH (PORTLET_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, USER_ID, ACCESS_YN, USER_TYPE, SN) VALUES (8, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 1, 0, 1) INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH (PORTLET_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, USER_ID, ACCESS_YN, USER_TYPE, SN) VALUES (9, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 1, 0, 1) INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH (PORTLET_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, USER_ID, ACCESS_YN, USER_TYPE, SN) VALUES (10, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 1, 0, 1) INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH (PORTLET_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, USER_ID, ACCESS_YN, USER_TYPE, SN) VALUES (11, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 1, 0, 1) INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH (PORTLET_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, USER_ID, ACCESS_YN, USER_TYPE, SN) VALUES (12, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 1, 0, 1) INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH (PORTLET_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, USER_ID, ACCESS_YN, USER_TYPE, SN) VALUES (14, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 1, 0, 1) INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH (PORTLET_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, USER_ID, ACCESS_YN, USER_TYPE, SN) VALUES (26, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 1, 0, 1) INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH (PORTLET_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, USER_ID, ACCESS_YN, USER_TYPE, SN) VALUES (34, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 1, 0, 1) INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH (PORTLET_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, USER_ID, ACCESS_YN, USER_TYPE, SN) VALUES (36, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 1, 0, 1) INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH (PORTLET_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, USER_ID, ACCESS_YN, USER_TYPE, SN) VALUES (47, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 1, 0, 1) INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH (PORTLET_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, USER_ID, ACCESS_YN, USER_TYPE, SN) VALUES (49, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 1, 0, 1) SELECT * FROM DUAL
sqlMap.select: SELECT menu_id FROM tbl_portal_menu WHERE menucode = 'survey' AND menu_type = 'G' AND ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU (menu_id, menu_url, menu_type, icon_url, default_order, menucode) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(menu_id), 0) + 1 FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU), '/ezSurvey/surveyMain.do', 'G', 'icon_topmenu icon_nav_survey', 19, 'survey')
INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP (company_id, tenant_id, menu_id, menu_used, company_lang, company_order) VALUES (#companyId#, #tenantId#, #menuId#, 1, 1, 19)
INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH (menu_id, company_id, tenant_id, user_id, access_YN, user_type, sn) VALUES (#menuId#, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 1, 0, 19)

INSERT ALL INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME (menu_id, menu_lang, company_id, tenant_id, menu_name) VALUES (#menuId#, 1, #companyID#, #tenantID#, '전자설문') INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME (menu_id, menu_lang, company_id, tenant_id, menu_name) VALUES (#menuId#, 2, #companyID#, #tenantID#, 'Survey') INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME (menu_id, menu_lang, company_id, tenant_id, menu_name) VALUES (#menuId#, 3, #companyID#, #tenantID#, '電子アンケート') SELECT * FROM DUAL
sqlMap.select: SELECT ISBEFOREDOC FROM TBL_HISTORYDOCINFO WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_HISTORYDOCINFO ADD ISBEFOREDOC CHAR(1 CHAR)
sqlMap.select: SELECT BEFOREDOCURL FROM TBL_HISTORYDOCINFO WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_HISTORYDOCINFO ADD BEFOREDOCURL VARCHAR2(255 CHAR)
sqlMap.select: SELECT VIEWORDER FROM TBL_APRATTACHINFO WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_APRATTACHINFO ADD VIEWORDER NUMBER(10,0)
sqlMap.select: SELECT VIEWORDER FROM TBL_ENDATTACHINFO WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_ENDATTACHINFO ADD VIEWORDER NUMBER(10,0)
sqlMap.select: SELECT VIEWORDER FROM TBL_TMPATTACHINFO WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_TMPATTACHINFO ADD VIEWORDER NUMBER(10,0)
sqlMap.select: SELECT companyid FROM TBL_CODELIST WHERE companyid = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND code1 = #code1# AND code2 = #code2# AND rownum = 1
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CODELIST (CODE1, CODE2, NAME, ISUSE, DESCRIPT, NAME2, NAME3, NAME4, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) VALUES (#code1#, #code2#, #name#, #isUse#, #descript#, #name2#, #name3#, #name4#, #tenantId#, #companyId#)
